pages.text: $(l)Step 1: Craft$()$(br)Place a Spell Workbench. Insert carrier + element (+ optional effect and base). Take the scroll.$(br2)$(l)Step 2: Load$()$(br)Hold wand, put scroll in off-hand. Shift+right-click to load into current slot.

$(l)Step 3: Cast!$()$(br)Right-click to fire. Hold to auto-fire. Shift+right-click to cycle slots.$(br2)$(l)Tips:$()$(br)- Combine Fire element + Explosion effect for fiery AOE$(br)- Use Beam carrier + Void element for instant wither$(br)- Nova + Holy + Healing = self-centered group heal$(br)- Higher tier wands = more slots + faster fire rate
